config.script:
"""
		Written By: Aniket Sagar
		Written Date: 15/12/2024
		Purpose: If previous page not logged in then revert to login page. 
	
	try:
	#start of try block
		#Check if user is logged or not if not then navigate to login page
		previousPage = self.session.custom.IsModelConfigurationAuthenticated
		if not previousPage:
			system.perspective.navigate('/')
		else:
			self.session.custom.TopViewHeader = "Model Configuration"
			system.perspective.closeDock('rightp')
			system.perspective.openDock("rightView")
			messageType = 'tableRefresh'    	 			
			system.perspective.sendMessage(messageType,scope = 'page' )
	#End of try block		
	except: 
	#start of except block  
		screenName ='Model Configuration'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Master Configuration/ModelConfiguration')  
		errorFunction = str('Event:onStartup  -> Model Configuration')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber) 
		"""

system.perspective.print("Start the row selection")
	selectedRow = self.props.selection.data
	messageType = 'classificationDataPanel'   
	headerLabel = "Edit"
	Action = "Update"
	system.perspective.print(selectedRow)
	#u'Legacy Axle', u'GearRation': u'7x41(5.85)', u'IsActive': True, u'PlantCode': u'D', u'M_BOMNumber': u'RA592', u'ModelRange': u'H'}]
	for data in	selectedRow:
		BomCode=data["M_BOMNumber"]
		system.perspective.print(BomCode)
		AreaName=data["AreaName"]
		ModelRange=data["ModelRange"]
		PlantCode=data["PlantCode"]
		GearRatio=data["GearRation"]
		isActive=data["IsActive"]
		M_BOMNumber_Id=data["M_BOMNumber_Id"]
		Area_Id=data["Area_Id"],
		classificationId=data["classificationId"]
		self.session.custom.classificationId=classificationId
		
		if isActive:
			isActive = 1
		else:
			isActive = 0
		
		payload = {'headerLabel':headerLabel,
				'M_BOMNumber':data["M_BOMNumber"],
				'AreaName':data["AreaName"],
				'ModelRange':data["ModelRange"],
				'PlantCode':data["PlantCode"],
				'GearRation':data["GearRation"],
				'IsActive':isActive,
					'Action':Action,
					'M_BOMNumber_Id':M_BOMNumber_Id,
					'Area_Id':Area_Id,
					'classificationId':classificationId}
		system.perspective.print("payload onRowClick-------->")
		system.perspective.print("payload %s"%payload)
		
	
	system.perspective.closeDock('rightp')
	system.perspective.openDock('rightView')
	system.perspective.sendMessage(messageType, payload, scope = 'page' )	
	#system.perspective.sendMessage("deleteIsVisible",payload = {"IsVisible":1,"id":int(Id),"folder":str(folderName),"colName":str(colName)}, scope = "page")
	system.perspective.sendMessage("isEditDisplay",payload = {"IsVisible":1}, scope = "page")

messageHandlers.script:
# implement your handler here
	"""
		Written By: Aniket Sagar
		Written Date: 14/11/2024
		Purpose: make table refersh and reset in panel. 
	"""
	try:
		self.refreshBinding("props.data")
		self.session.custom.type='Add'
		headerLabel = "Add"
		messageType = 'classificationDataPanel'  
		Action = "Save" 				 	
		payload = {'headerLabel':headerLabel,
								'M_BOMNumber':-1,
								'AreaName':'',
								'ModelRange':'',
								'PlantCode':'',
								'GearRation':'',
								'IsActive':1,
								'Area_Id':-1,
								'M_BOMNumber_Id':-1
								}		
		system.perspective.sendMessage(messageType, payload, scope = 'page' )
		system.perspective.sendMessage("tableRow",payload = {"Index":-1}, scope = "page")	
		#system.perspective.sendMessage("deleteIsVisible",payload = {"IsVisible":0}, scope = "page")	
		system.perspective.sendMessage("isEditDisplay",payload = {"IsVisible":0}, scope = "page")
	except:   
	#start of except block  
		screenName ='classificationDataPanel tableRefresh msgHandler'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Pannel/Master/classificationDataPanel')  
		errorFunction = str('Event:onRowClick -> cntBody/tblImage')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber)

# implement your handler here
	self.props.selection.selectedRow = payload['Index']

config.script:
"""
		Written By: Aniket Sagar
		Written Date: 27/10/2024
		Purpose: Pass dropdown values to custom params. 
	"""
	try:
		self.view.params.Area=self.parent.parent.parent.getChild("cntFlex").getChild("cntArea").getChild("drpCode").props.value
		self.view.params.BomCode=self.parent.parent.parent.getChild("cntFlex").getChild("cntCode").getChild("drpCode").props.value
		self.view.params.ModelType=self.parent.parent.parent.getChild("cntFlex").getChild("cntModelType").getChild("drpModelType").props.value
	except:
		screenName ='Classification Data Configuration Filter'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Pannel/Master/ClassificationData')  
		errorFunction = str('Event:onActionPerformed -> cntSave/btn_Save')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber) 
	#End of except block

"""
		Written By: Aniket Sagar
		Written Date: 27/10/2024
		Purpose: Reset all selections. 
	"""
	self.parent.parent.parent.getChild("cntFlex").getChild("cntArea").getChild("drpCode").props.value=''
	self.parent.parent.parent.getChild("cntFlex").getChild("cntCode").getChild("drpCode").props.value=''
	self.parent.parent.parent.getChild("cntFlex").getChild("cntModelType").getChild("drpModelType").props.value=''
	self.view.params.Area=''
	self.view.params.BomCode=''
	self.view.params.ModelType=''

try:
       # Get the table data
       table_data = self.parent.parent.parent.getChild("cntBody").getChild("tblModelMaster").props.data
       
       # Initialize message text
       message_text = ""
   
       # Check if the table contains data
       if table_data is not None and len(table_data) > 0:
           try:
               # If data is available, export it to Excel and trigger download
               excel_data = system.dataset.toExcel(True, [table_data])
               system.perspective.download(fileName="Classification Data.xlsx", data=excel_data)
               message = "Classification Data download successful to your local system in Excel format."
               setMessage("Success", message)
           except Exception as e:
               # Handle errors during Excel export or download
               system.perspective.print("Error during export or download: %s" % str(e))
               message = "An error occurred during export. Please try again or contact MES team"
               setMessage("Error", message)
       else:
           # Handle case where no data is available
           message = "No data available to export for given Inputs."
           setMessage("Error", message)
   
   except Exception as e:
       # Handle unexpected errors in the overall script
       system.perspective.print("Unexpected error: %s" % str(e))
       setMessage("Error", "An unexpected error occurred. Please Contact MES team")

def setMessage(status, message):
    system.perspective.sendMessage(
        messageType="setMessage",
        payload={
            "message": message,
            "status": status
        },
        scope="view"
    )
